text: DLL was added to the audiodg.exe process
1. Start Event Viewer (type eventvwr from command line
2. Navigate to Applications and Services Log/Microsoft/Windows/CodeIntegrity/Operational node
3. Check the error level events with ID 3002; you'll see the offending binary path.
The event text should read as: Code Integrity is unable to verify the image integrity of the file ...
To get the build to boot, audiodg is being restarted outside of the protected
